_meta.name: Unknown / Unidentified Insurance Protocol
_meta.notes: Fallback protocol when payer cannot be identified. Key principle: process first, verify later. Uses Carelon baseline for clinical sufficiency assessment.

clinical_baseline.description: Carelon criteria serve as industry baseline. Unknown payers are checked against Carelon-level documentation to provide conditional readiness status.

conditional_outputs.meets_baseline: If auth required → likely meets criteria
conditional_outputs.does_not_meet_baseline: If auth required → more information likely needed

workflow.description: Extract clinical data normally. Do NOT stop because payer is unknown.
Compare against Carelon baseline. Generate conditional readiness output.
Set FLAG_UNKNOWN_PAYER. Must call to verify auth requirements.
Use number on card. Determine: auth required? HST code? Submission method?
Combine auth requirement + clinical readiness. Ready to schedule OR action needed.

step_1_check_card: Network logos (BCBS, UHC, Cigna, Aetna, etc.)
identification_checklist.step_3_check_availity: Try eligibility lookup in Availity — may route to correct payer

information_to_gather: What is the HST code (G0399 or 95806)?
How to submit auth if required?
verification_call_script.source: Main phone number on back of card

minimum_scheduling_requirements.notes: Portal, phone, fax — if auth required

unusual_card_with_network_logo.description: Card shows unfamiliar name BUT has BCBS/UHC/Cigna/Aetna logo
unusual_card_with_network_logo.action: Likely IBA/TPA using that network. Call card number (not network). Ask if standard network rules apply.

self_funded_employer_plan.description: Card shows employer name, not insurance company
self_funded_employer_plan.action: Likely self-funded plan. May use TPA (EBMS, Meritain, etc.) or network (Multiplan, PHCS). Call to determine actual handler. Rules set by employer, not network.

no_card_verbal_only.description: Patient provides insurance name verbally, no card
no_card_verbal_only.action: Request card/ID number. Cannot proceed without verifiable information. FLAG_INSURANCE_UNVERIFIED. Schedule tentatively, verify before service.

out_of_state_plan.action: Check if BCBS (use prefix lookup). Verify network status. Call to verify auth requirements. Confirm OOS provider acceptance.

flags.message: Insurance payer not recognized. Call using number on card to verify auth requirements.
If auth required → likely meets criteria
If auth required → more information likely needed
New payer identified — add to insurance.json and create criteria file
Insurance info provided verbally only — request card before service

escalation: Consider scheduling as self-pay pending verification
